events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail**, **critical** risk. Missing a stored-energy source (hydraulic/gravity/capacitor) during LOTO is a classic fatal-hazard gap under OSHA 1910.147 — the primary disconnect being locked doesn't protect against residual pressure, suspended mass, or charge. Immediate action is to stop work, identify and neutralize all stored energy (bleed/block/discharge), verify zero-energy state, and update the machine-specific procedure before resuming.
